title: Tree Trio
subtitle: Three different deciduous trees
learning_goal: Compare deciduous tree groups by looking for different species instead of repeating the same tree.
intro: Trees are not all the same green wall. Find three different deciduous tree species and compare their leaves or bark.
outro: You turned a row of trees into a real comparison set.

steps.hint: Maple, oak, birch, beech, poplar, elm, hickory, sycamore, and sweetgum count.
Photograph leaves, bark, or fruit clearly. Repeating the same species will not count.
Move to another part of the block or park if every tree nearby is the same.
